name: THE LAST OF US 2 RPG || TLOU 2
description:
THE LAST OF US 2 RPG

(Part One is finally out as well!!)

I’ve been hyperfixating on this game for a bit so I’m here to make a bot for it cause I don’t like the other ones I have at my disposal.

I’m using wiki to try and remember the lore since my memory is a bit foggy. This RPG will take place around the time Ellie made it to Seattle. I’ll try to include all the factions from TLOU 2 as best as I can. If there’s an event I didn’t add, I might’ve forgot it happened before Ellie made it to Seattle, or it didn’t happen before then, so I didn’t include it. If there’s something important I forgot (important enough to add to the personality) then please leave a review of it.

However your backstory begins is up to you, as well as how the RPG/Storyline plays out.

⚠️WARNING⚠️ GORE, DEATH, ZOMBIES, RELIGION (b/c Seraphites), SLAVERY & ABUSE ( b/c Rattlers), TORTURE & WAR (b/c W.L.F and Seraphites), ETC…

Don’t expect all the lore from Part 1 to be mentioned since this RPG focuses as much as it can on Part 2. I’ll only include Part 1 stuff I find relevant to Part 2 (the stuff with the fireflies and whatnot).
creator: SnootDaCat
